productDecision.speakerSemantics: anonymous session-local Speaker N labels; no biometric identity recognition

limitations: Does not measure diarization error rate

wireContract.input: binary signed PCM16 little-endian, mono 16 kHz when --pcm-input is set
wireContract.output: JSON transcript snapshots/diffs with speaker IDs and diarization alignment state
wireContract.browserExposure: forbidden; Boring same-origin proxy owns authentication and Origin enforcement
wireContract.authentication: Authorization: Bearer from server-side proxy only; query token support must be patched out or rejected

findings: Normal WebSocket audio is processed through in-memory queues.
Sortformer debug audio accumulation and diarization_audio.wav output are guarded by self.debug, which is false by default.
The deployment must permanently remove or disable the debug write branch and run on a read-only root filesystem.
No target-container writable-layer/log/core-dump/swap proof has run yet.

requiredBeforePass: Build the pinned source and models into an immutable OCI image and record its digest.
Run on the target NVIDIA GPU and record driver, CUDA, GPU, VRAM, RTF, latency, and one-hour stability.
Run a consented French 2-4 speaker meeting corpus with overlap and record WER plus DER.
Prove speaker-tag stability, transcript alignment, final drain, browser-terminal close, and one upstream restart behavior.
Run with read-only root, no writable audio sink, request/body/output logging disabled, debug false/removed, core dumps and swap disabled.
Scan controlled logs, writable layers, mounts, and app locations for audio after the smoke.
Verify the ASR model license and attribution obligations before distribution.
